subcodes.first_line: Who can recount the tale of separation, or bring to mind the binding covenant of the pact, shouldst Thou not ordain the wondrous decree of reunion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شرح فراق که تواند داد و یا عهد محکم میثاق که آرد بر یاد حکم بدیع تلاق ندهی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
